programme.title: Pippa
programme.desc: Balram Singh Mehta of the 45th Cavalry tank squadron steps up to prove his worth by fighting on the eastern front during the Indo-Pakistani war of 1971.

programme.title: Khuda Haafiz: Chapter 2 - Agni Pariksha
programme.desc: After the death of his friend's brother, Sameer and Nargis adopt his daughter Nandini. However, trouble ensues when she gets kidnapped.

programme.title: Bheed
programme.desc: A policeman, a victim of bigotry, takes on the task of preventing migrants from crossing state borders during a major health crisis. However, tensions arise as the ground reality of prejudice emerges.

programme.title: Sam Bahadur
programme.desc: Sam Manekshaw, an Indian army officer, navigates through his eventful life filled with ups and downs, including him getting promoted to the rank of Field Marshal.

programme.title: Dhol
programme.desc: Four lazy friends want to make easy money and aim to marry a rich girl. Their plan backfires after they meet Ritu and get embroiled with a dangerous criminal.

programme.title: Shamitabh
programme.desc: A mute man who dreams of becoming an actor and a man come together for a purpose, but their differences cause them to drift apart due to their egos.

programme.title: Satyaprem Ki Katha
programme.desc: Satyaprem tries hard to prove himself as a worthy person and restore the faith in the love of Khata, who is overwhelmed by her breakup.

programme.title: Omkara
programme.desc: Ishwar dreams of becoming Omkara's successor after the latter wins the election. However, when Omkara appoints Keshav as his lieutenant, he feels betrayed and plots revenge.

programme.title: Khatta Meetha
programme.desc: A seemingly corrupt petty contractor faces challenges from the local municipality, his family, his employees, as well as a former girlfriend and her family.

programme.title: Golmaal: Fun Unlimited
programme.desc: Friends Gopal, Lucky, Madhav and Laxman often dupe gullible people out of their money. Hilarity ensues when they target a middle-aged couple and simultaneously try wooing their beautiful neighbour.

programme.title: Cirkus
programme.desc: Two sets of identical twins are separated at birth and grow in two different cities. Years later, chaos ensues when one set of twins decides to visit the town where the other runs a circus.
